data.title: Swiss Bank Offers Ripple’s RLUSD Custody and Trading
data.description:
AMINA, a Swiss bank, has become the world’s first globally operating bank to offer Ripple’s RLUSD. It began hosting trading and custody services immediately upon the announcement. Ripple is integrating RLUSD with TradFi across the board, applying for its own bank license earlier this week. If it receives such a license, it would gain new stablecoin opportunities, but XRP might not directly benefit
source: https://beincrypto.com/amina-bank-switzerland-ripple-rlusd-services/

data.title: Top US Crypto Exchange by Trading Volume Coinbase Adds Support for Leading Cross-Chain Messaging Protocol Wormhole (W)
data.description:
The top US crypto exchange platform by trading volume is abruptly adding support for Wormhole (W), causing the native asset of the cross-chain messaging project to rally briefly. In a new announcement, Coinbase Assets says it’s adding Wormhole, an interoperability project that allows communication between blockchains, to its suite of digital asset products.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/03/top-us-crypto-exchange-by-trading-volume-coinbase-adds-support-for-leading-cross-chain-messaging-protocol-wormhole-w/

data.title: Ethereum Looks Strong Despite Volatility – $10,000 Price Target Gains Momentum
data.description:
Ethereum has regained strong bullish momentum over the past few days, rising more than 23% since June 22 and reclaiming the critical $2,600 level. After weeks of uncertainty and sideways movement, ETH is showing signs of strength, with bulls now eyeing a push toward the $2,700 resistance zone. A successful reclaim of this level could open the doors for a broader rally, potentially reigniting hopes for the long-awaited altseason. Related Reading: Tron DeFi Activity Expands: SunSwap Hits $3B+ Monthly Swaps In 2025 While volatility remains in the broader market, Ethereum’s recovery has been notable, especially as macroeconomic sentiment improves and risk appetite increases across both equities and crypto
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-looks-strong-despite-volatility-10000-price-target-gains-momentum/

data.title: Fitch Director Predicts U.S. Deficit to Exceed 7% of GDP Next Year
data.description: According to Odaily, Fitch Senior Director Richard Francis stated that Fitch has long anticipated significant tax cuts in its baseline fiscal forecasts. The passage of the bill will not substantially alter this baseline. It is expected that the total U.S. government deficit will rise to over 7% of GDP next year, with the debt ratio approaching 120% of GDP by 2026.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 110,000 USDT with a 0.80% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 03, 2025, 21:03 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 110,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 110,000 USDT, with a narrowed 0.80% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Analyst: Trump's bill will support the stock market and is optimistic about cyclical industries
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gene Goldman, chief investment officer of Cetera Investment Management, said that the passage of the "big and beautiful" bill: The bill provides clear benefits to businesses and households, and these benefits tend to support corporate profits and stock prices. We will ignore the fact that the Congressional Budget Office expects the bill to increase debt by approximately $3 to $3.4 trillion over the next decade. (The bill) may require larger Treasury issuance, which has already triggered caution in the bond market, as evidenced by the rise in bond yields. In addition, these higher deficits may push up inflation expectations. From a stock industry perspective, cyclical industries are expected to benefit, especially energy companies (cancellation of green energy subsidies), industrial companies (increased infrastructure spending), the financial industry (reduced uncertainty, general deregulation, and a steeper yield curve), and the consumer goods industry (lower taxes).

data.title: Fitch: Passage of Trump bill does not change baseline forecast
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Richard Francis, senior director of Fitch, said that Fitch has long expected substantial tax cuts in its baseline fiscal forecasts, and the passage of this bill will not significantly change our baseline. We expect the total US government deficit to rise to more than 7% of GDP next year, and the debt ratio will be close to 120% of GDP by 2026.

data.title: The "Big and Beautiful" bill was passed, and Biden and Harris criticized it one after another
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Former US President Biden posted on the social media platform "X" criticizing the passage of Trump's "big and beautiful" tax and spending bill. Biden said that the Republican budget bill was not only reckless, but also cruel. It cut Medicaid and took away health care for millions of Americans. It closed rural hospitals and cut food assistance for veterans and the elderly. It raised energy bills and may lead to significant cuts in health insurance while increasing the deficit by $4 trillion. All of this is to give billionaires massive tax cuts. Former US Vice President Harris also said that Republicans in Congress voted to destroy millions of people across our country-kick Americans out of health care, close hospitals, cancel food assistance and increase costs.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Predicts Numerous Trade Agreements by July
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant has announced that a significant number of trade agreements are expected to be finalized by July 9. It is anticipated that approximately 100 countries will receive at least a 10% reciprocal tariff, with several trade agreements set to be announced.
